quantum.title: Quantum Readiness Assessment
quantum.summary: Inventory of agency systems with post-quantum vulnerability exposure; prioritized migration roadmap to lattice-based cryptography.

quantum.title: Quantum Communications Test Bed
quantum.summary: Pilot QKD link between Protocol authority nodes to evaluate hardware, key-rate, and integration with existing PKI.

quantum.title: Quantum Workforce Development Plan
quantum.summary: Scholarship, curriculum, and industry placement pipeline for quantum engineers, cryptographers, and physicists.

biotechnology.title: Gene Editing Oversight Framework
biotechnology.summary: Permitting, consent, ecological impact, and intergenerational review requirements for somatic and germline research.

biotechnology.title: Biosecurity Data Sharing Protocol
biotechnology.summary: Encrypted, access-controlled pathogen and bio-design reporting infrastructure coordinated with Health and Safety ministries.

biotechnology.title: Synthetic Biology Sandbox Program
biotechnology.summary: Contained experimental zone with monitoring, insurance, and rapid shutdown protocols for engineered organisms.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Vehicle Safety Standard
autonomous.summary: Operational design domain, fallback behavior, data logging, and human-override requirements for ground and aerial systems.

autonomous.title: AI Decision Audit Standard
autonomous.summary: Explainability, accountability, and counterfactual logging requirements for high-stakes autonomous decision pipelines.

autonomous.title: Robotics Interoperability Charter
autonomous.summary: Shared identity, messaging, and safety-interlock protocol for multi-vendor robot fleets in civic deployments.
